title: Theme Recipe Reel
description: Dogfood walkthrough for making a new theme or remaking the shipped looks from a shared recipe model.

chapters.title: Recipe
chapters.description: The structured recipe page: what really changes across themes and where builder parity stops.

chapters.title: Routing
chapters.description: Published versus pinned theme behavior and why the active alias matters.

chapters.title: Colors
chapters.description: Semantic palette roles are the first builder lane and the cleanest shared knob.

chapters.title: Type
chapters.description: Display, body, label, and mono roles matter as much as color once the themes get more opinionated.

chapters.title: Spacing
chapters.description: Density and rhythm are part of the recipe, not an afterthought.

chapters.title: Effects
chapters.description: Shadows, glow, border emphasis, and motion split the louder looks from the calmer ones.

chapters.title: Ocean
chapters.description: Ocean proves the direct token-and-shell path.

chapters.title: Pumpkin
chapters.description: Pumpkin adds rounded shape language without abandoning the core shell.

chapters.title: Editorial
chapters.description: Editorial needs role-based typography and calmer chrome, not just a new accent color.

chapters.title: Mockup
chapters.description: Mockup is a mode family: sketch font, border-first surfaces, and motion dialed down hard.

chapters.title: Walmart
chapters.description: Walmart is still the fork case and needs shell cleanup before a recipe builder can claim full parity.

chapters.title: Preview Surface
chapters.description: The standalone preview surface is the fastest proof loop for checking a theme and mode in isolation.

chapters.title: Render Surface
chapters.description: The hosted renderer can mount the shared preview preset under any theme and mode without the shell around it.
